world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG gothic-punk world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: World of Darkness / Vampire: The Masquerade inspired gothic horror map, diverse archipelago terrain type.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye nocturnal atlas view of a vast black ocean filled with many gothic island groups, microcontinents, and hidden supernatural domains.
Subject: diverse archipelago layout with uneven island distribution across a broad dark ocean: several large city-islands, microcontinents, tiny haunted islets, curved island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, craggy islands, fragmented rocky coasts, cemetery islands, Elysium islands, sewer-warren port islands, ruined haven islands, werewolf forest islands, mountain islands, wetland islands, tundra islands, and fogbound coastal towns.
Style/medium: gothic vampire masquerade city map expanded to archipelago scale, noir atmosphere, domain territories marked with non-text sigils, dark illustrated RPG sourcebook cartography, highly detailed.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, no single dominant mainland, island groups sweep in organic arcs and clusters, full archipelago visible with black ocean border.
Lighting/mood: gothic-punk political horror, eternal night, blood moon, deep shadows, masquerade secrecy, smuggling routes, predatory courts and hidden covens.
Color palette: charcoal black, desaturated purple, blood red, moonlit silver, fog grey, deep blue-black ocean, muted biome colors under nocturnal haze.
Materials/textures: black parchment, engraved silver ink coastlines, smoky fog layers, subtle blood-red domain sigils, aged paper grain, dark waves and shoals.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable words, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Avoid grid-like spacing and avoid identical island shapes.
